ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., T-Ball, Soccer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Duration and timing of the activity */,
  "times" TEXT /* Scheduled times for the activity */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week the activity occurs */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the activity takes place */,
  "ages" TEXT /* Age group the activity is intended for */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of participation */,
  "wishlist" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity is added to the wishlist */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., T-Ball, soccer, basketball) */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the activity (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season or semester when the activity takes place */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed for the activity */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Last date for registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., park, school, community center) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being registered for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant registering for the activity */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration occurred */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "guardian_contact" TEXT /* Guardian contact information */,
  "medical_info" TEXT /* Medical information or special requirements */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the document pertains to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., waiver, guidelines) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the wishlist entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity added to the wishlist */,
  "wishlist_status" TEXT /* Status of the wishlist entry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being attended */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant attending the activity */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent, late) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_attendance_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_attendance_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., activity, coach, facility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
